description: Welcome to your favourites list. From here, you can create a custom map using the resources listed below. Use the checkboxes to select the resources you want to include, then click the View on map button at the bottom of the table. If a resource doesn’t have an available map layer, it can’t be selected — but you can still view its details by clicking the row in the table to navigate to the corresponding record page. To remove a resource, click the garbage can icon next to its name, or use the Remove all button to clear the list.
datasetsDescription: Manage your saved datasets here. Select one or more resources with map layers, then click View on map to open them together. You can remove individual resources with the garbage can icon or use Remove all to clear your list.
loginInfo: Save datasets and create personalized maps with your Geo.ca account. Sign in or register with CanadaLogin to get started.
landingDescription: Choose where you want to continue. Open your saved datasets or saved maps from this landing page.
datasetsLandingDescription: Review and manage your saved dataset resources, then open selected items on the map.
mapsLandingDescription: Access your saved map configurations to open, download, upload, or delete them.
landingTipLabel: Tip: Use Datasets when you want to build a new map from resources, and Maps when you want to reopen a saved map setup.
mapsTipLabel: Tip: To download a PDF, PNG, or JPEG version of your map, click View, wait for the map to load, and then click the export icon on the left side of the map.
deleteMapFailed: Unable to delete this saved map. Please try again.
uploadMapFailed: Unable to upload the file. Please check the file format and try again.
savedMapsTooLarge: Your saved maps collection is too large. Please delete some maps before adding a new one.
mapLimitReached: You have reached the maximum number of saved maps (25).
mapsDescription: Manage your saved map configuration files here. Import a map file with Upload, open it with View, export it with Download, or remove it with Delete. Downloaded files can be shared with other users.
savedDataUnavailable: Your saved datasets and maps are temporarily unavailable. Please refresh after reconnecting to the database.
saveMapHelp: Click on Save map to save a configuration of the map as it currently looks, including open tabs and any panning or zooming.
saveMapFailed: Unable to save the current map. Please try again.
saveMapPrompt: Enter a name for this map
savedMapsEmpty: You have no saved maps yet.
title: Favourites
